answer: Nmap ek network scanning tool hai jo open ports aur services detect karta hai.

Ethical hacking roadmap:

1. Networking basics (TCP/IP, DNS)
2. Linux fundamentals
3. Web basics (HTTP, HTML, JS)
4. Web security (OWASP Top 10)
5. Tools (Nmap, Burp Suite, SQLmap)
6. Practice (TryHackMe, HackTheBox)
7. Bug bounty practice

Start with basics → then labs → then real targets (legal).
Phishing ek attack hai jisme attacker fake website ya email se data churaata hai.
